name: Fried Ice Cream5
recipeInstructions:
1. Place ice cream balls in a pan and cover with foil or plastic wrap. Freeze until very firm, at least 3 hours.
2. In a small bowl, combine crumbs and cinnamon.
3. Quickly roll each ice cream ball in the crumbs; set aside the extra crumbs.
4. Put the coated balls back into the freezer until very firm, 1-3 hours.
5. In a small bowl, beat egg and milk until blended.
6. Quickly coat each ball with the egg mixture, then roll again in the crumbs.
7. Return to freezer until very firm, 1-3 hours.
8. Heat oil to 375°F (a 1-inch cube of bread should turn golden brown in about 45 seconds).
9. Using a slotted spoon, lower one ice cream ball at a time into hot oil.
10. Fry until the coating begins to brown, approximately 8-10 seconds on each side.
11. Serve immediately, plain or with sauce.
